Maligaya Agro‑Tech, Inc. (Philippine issuer) Data Processing and MNPI Handling Notice; SEC Reg. No. CS2024-987654.
This notice applies to processing under the Data Privacy Act of 2012 and to handling of material non-public information under the Securities Regulation Code in HR, tax, banking, and disclosure workflows.
We process PII (e.g., names, addresses, Tax Identification Numbers, emails, phone numbers) and MNPI (unreleased financials, budgets, board actions) for payroll, compliance, and SEC/PSE filings.
Example record: Mr. Elias D. Soriano, TIN 123-456-789-000, elias.soriano@maligaya.com.ph, +63 917 555 0134, Unit 12B Lakbay Tower, 88 Ilaya Ext., Brgy. Luntian, San Palay City, Rizalia 1901.
Payroll details may include BayanBank Account No. 00-456-123456-7 and PH Passport No. P1234567Q (invalid sample, not for verification) retained only for travel facilitation.
For access, correction, or deletion requests, contact Data Protection Officer Ms. Pilar A. Velasco via dpo@maligaya.com.ph, +63 2 8723 0043, or mail to 5F Allegra Center, Camino Verde Rd., Brgy. Malig, San Palay City, Rizalia 1901.
Generic intake forms may display labels such as Applicant Name: __________ and Position: __________, which by themselves do not identify an individual.
MNPI is restricted to need-to-know; insiders must observe blackout periods and may not trade until a Form 17-C has been filed and the disclosure is publicly available.
We share limited data with Balangay Payroll Services OPC and Laguna Transfer Agent Corp. under DPA-compliant agreements; cross-border processing via CloudHub APAC Pte. Ltd. (SG) follows NPC Circular No. 16-01.
Retention: HR/tax records are kept for up to 10 years under applicable law; insider and trading-window records for 5 years; thereafter data is deleted or anonymized per policy.
Access controls are role-based (e.g., HR Officer, Compliance Officer, Treasurer) and logged; role titles alone are not treated as personal identifiers.
For avoidance of doubt, the Citizens’ Complaint Hotline 8888 is a public service number and must not be used for privacy requests or insider disclosures to the company.
Placeholder IDs such as SSS No. 01-2345678-9X and PhilID 0000-0000-0000-0000 are invalid and will not be recorded as legitimate credentials.
Questions under this notice are resolved by the DPO and are subject to guidance from competent regulators without waiving any statutory rights.
